g.text: Rank models across scenarios, adapters, cluster topology, stability, and throughput.
7 rows · 7 runs · best adapter per model · 18 score dims + perf + stability
• Scores are percentages (0–100%); higher is better for every column except Set (⚠ is worse).
mark the top-3 values within each column (per-column podium, recomputed when you re-sort).
means no data: that (model, adapter) pair was never tested on a scenario contributing to that dimension.
• Click a header to sort by that column; click again to toggle ascending/descending.
Rank position under the current sort. Click any header to re-sort by that column (descending); click again to toggle direction. Defaults to Overall descending.
Model identifier as reported by the served endpoint (or as recorded at run time). Multiple rows per model can appear if it was tested with different adapters or on different clusters.

Tool-use adapter the run was scored against — 'raw' = vanilla OpenAI-compatible tool-calling, 'hermes' = Hermes/Erebus wrapper, etc. Adapters change how tool calls are framed, so scores are NOT comparable across
